assertion_results.text: Each task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Target Branch, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 task files contain the required sections. Task 1: Repository (trustify-backend), Target Branch (main), Description, Files to Create, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements. Task 2: Repository, Target Branch, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements. Task 3: Repository, Target Branch, Description, Files to Create, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements. Task 4: Repository, Target Branch, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements. Task 5: Repository, Target Branch, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements. Task 6: Repository, Target Branch, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements.

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: There are exactly 6 task files: task-1-advisory-severity-summary-model.md, task-2-advisory-summary-service.md, task-3-advisory-summary-endpoint.md, task-4-cache-invalidation.md, task-5-integration-tests.md, task-6-api-documentation.md. 6 is within the range [3, 10].
All 6 task files have '## Repository' followed by 'trustify-backend': task-1 line 2, task-2 line 2, task-3 line 2, task-4 line 2, task-5 line 2, task-6 line 2.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency graph: Task 1 has no dependencies. Task 2 depends on Task 1. Task 3 depends on Task 2. Task 4 depends on Task 3. Task 5 depends on Task 3 and Task 4. Task 6 depends on Task 3. This forms a directed acyclic graph: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5, 3 -> 5, 3 -> 6. No cycles exist.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: Files to Modify paths all exist in the repo manifest: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (task 1), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (task 2), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (task 3), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (task 4), tests/api/sbom.rs (task 5), README.md and modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (task 6). Files to Create are new files in existing directories: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs (task 1, parent dir exists in manifest), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (task 3, parent dir exists in manifest).

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: The impact-map.md lists 8 specific changes with exact file paths and actions: 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary response struct in modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/', 'Add advisory_summary aggregation method to SbomService in modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs', 'Add advisory_summary endpoint handler in modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/ implementing GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary with optional threshold query param', etc. Each change specifies what to add/modify, where, and with what parameters.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks have '## Repository' followed by exactly one repository name 'trustify-backend'. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 task files contain: '## Target Branch' (set to 'main'), '## Description' (with substantive content), '## Acceptance Criteria' (with checkbox items), and '## Test Requirements' (with checkbox items). Verified in task-1 through task-6.

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: All Files to Modify paths match the repo-backend.md manifest exactly: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (manifest line 41), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (manifest line 46), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (manifest line 48), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (manifest line 83), tests/api/sbom.rs (manifest line 111), README.md (manifest line 13), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (created in task 3, referenced in task 6 as modify). Files to Create are in directories that exist in the manifest: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/ and modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs, details.rs, and specific derives (Serialize, Deserialize, ToSchema). Task 2 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs, entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, common/src/db/query.rs, common/src/error.rs with specific method names and patterns. Task 3 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs and list.rs with specific Axum patterns (Path, Query extractors). Task 4 references modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs and entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs with specific invalidation patterns. Task 5 references tests/api/sbom.rs, tests/api/advisory.rs with specific test patterns (assert_eq!(resp.status(), StatusCode::OK)). Task 6 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs and list.rs for utoipa::path macro patterns.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section set to 'main'
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 task files have '## Target Branch' followed by 'main': task-1 line 5, task-2 line 5, task-3 line 5, task-4 line 5, task-5 line 5, task-6 line 5.

assertion_results.text: After each task is created, a description digest comment is posted with a format-tagged SHA-256 hash — exactly 64 lowercase hex characters prefixed by 'sha256-md:' or 'sha256-adf:', not a placeholder, abbreviated value, or example string. Marker format: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:<64-char-hex>' (or sha256-adf). The digest is computed by re-fetching the description from the API and running scripts/sha256-digest.py
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 task files contain valid digest lines: task-1 'sha256-md:ba71d3eefbd7593007a6ffb76249b182c5a442a4eee0a0a7069985e2371ceaa3' (64 hex chars), task-2 'sha256-md:533373401e86f4af6c34f4edaca6e4f415a49627d8dc75cbe5cc77722ea815d2' (64 hex chars), task-3 'sha256-md:53bd95fe491180e7caefac039ba07e2e0f040850d0a7aaa79add0db85e53f32c' (64 hex chars), task-4 'sha256-md:9532af4b74705944baa8f39d9e00b4ba5dd3329a2d2f60b90164cc8ced7729e2' (64 hex chars), task-5 'sha256-md:24fe66d2c77e2da6f6ed54fa22336999d3813178f1b5cf9dbcd4e536cc57e9c5' (64 hex chars), task-6 'sha256-md:5af8bd2d73e6731f5ecc3dfcc781faf38399829464b33c8ef7b5ace00e4fe294' (64 hex chars). All are exactly 64 lowercase hex characters, not placeholders or abbreviated values.

assertion_results.text: Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md before including a convention — inapplicable conventions are excluded entirely (not listed with 'Not applicable' annotations), and applicable ones include a rationale in the prescribed format ('Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'), not free-form prose
assertion_results.evidence: All convention rationales use the prescribed format. Examples: task-1 'Applies: task creates modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs matching the convention's module pattern scope.', task-2 'Applies: task modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs matching the convention's .rs files scope.', task-3 'Applies: task modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs matching the convention's endpoint registration scope.', task-5 'Applies: task modifies tests/api/sbom.rs matching the convention's test files scope.' No conventions are listed with 'Not applicable', 'N/A', or 'does NOT apply' annotations — grep for these patterns returned empty results. Each rationale names a specific file from Files to Modify or Files to Create and references the convention's scope signal.
